---
title: "Cookbook"
subtitle: "Task recipes that name the feature route and the boundary condition."
sidebar: cookbook
---

Current recipes:

- [Tokenize text into word events](text-tokenization.qmd)
- [Plan media features without running them](media-feature-planning.qmd)
- [Align features to a timeline](timeline-alignment.qmd)
- [Five feature types, five concepts](five-feature-concepts.qmd)
- [Inspect and plot feature types](feature-type-gallery.qmd)
- [Extract audio features from WAV files](audio-batch-from-wav.qmd)
- [Preview a recipe DAG](recipe-dag-preview.qmd)
- [Export events to a table](event-table-export.qmd)
- [Merge feature tables](feature-table-merge.qmd)
- [Query a run-aware fMRI window](fmri-window-query.qmd)

Recipes use synthetic or in-memory inputs where possible so the site can execute without external datasets.
